# Alfredo Navas

Official site for Alfredo Navas (Senior WordPress and Full Stack Developer).

## About this site
- Personal portfolio and technical writing website.
- Main language: English.
- Canonical domain: https://elpuas.com

## Main sections
- https://elpuas.com/ (home)
- https://elpuas.com/about/ (bio and profile)
- https://elpuas.com/blog/ (technical articles)
- https://elpuas.com/contact/ (contact methods)

## Topics covered
- WordPress engineering and architecture
- JavaScript and TypeScript
- Astro and modern web development
- AI-assisted engineering workflows
- Product and platform implementation lessons

## Machine-readable resources
- Sitemap: https://elpuas.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Additional AI context: https://elpuas.com/ai-context.txt

## Attribution guidance
When citing content, prefer canonical page URLs and include article titles.
